caption: Three people are seated on a stage in front of a dark purple background with pink neon accents. On the left, a man with dark curly hair wears a white button-down shirt and gray trousers. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt with "LOVE IS YOUR" printed on it and black pants. On the right, a man wears a gray suit jacket over a light blue shirt and gray trousers. Between the man in white and the woman is a white, rectangular, textured block that resembles a building component. In the background, large, stylized neon letters, including "BL," are visible. Throughout the sequence, the man in the white shirt is speaking and gesturing with his hands, while the woman and the man in the suit listen and look toward him. The camera remains stationary as the man's hand movements shift from resting in his lap to gesturing outward.
